name: autopilot-codex
description: Codex-native autopilot workflow bundle with design-first workflows and a completion sound hook.

interface.shortDescription: Design-first autopilot workflows for Codex CLI
interface.longDescription: Installs autopilot-codex, autopilot-commit-codex, and autopilot-doctor-codex as official Codex plugin skills, and plays the preferred completion sound when a Codex turn stops. This package keeps the workflow design-first and approval-gated without relying on repo launchers, bridge processes, watcher loops, or Claude-only hooks.
defaultPrompt: Use Autopilot for Codex to prepare a design-first implementation workflow.
Use Autopilot Commit for Codex to prepare a verified Chinese git commit.
Use Autopilot Doctor for Codex to audit project readiness for autopilot.
